haiku45.summary_excerpt: Deliverable is fundamentally incomplete and non-functional. CRITICAL OMISSIONS: (1) No bats test files exist—task explicitly requires 'All tests must be runnable with bats'; (2) No fixture directories/files provided—task requires 'Create sample test result files'; (3) No act execution proof—task requires act runs via workflow with output in act-result.txt; (4) Workflow references non-existent fixtures (fixtures/run1-3), so it will fail. SECURITY: actions/checkout@v4 not SHA-pinned (violates stat

gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: Robust implementation using Python for XML parsing and jq for JSON. Excellent error handling with `set -euo pipefail`. Workflow is secure and well-structured. Note: Python string interpolation (line 58) and key iteration (line 155) are sensitive to special characters/spaces in filenames/test names.
